diseases.name: Malaria
diseases.initial_advice: Based on these symptoms, Malaria is a possibility. You must seek a **Malaria test** at a nearby clinic immediately. Keep hydrated and use mosquito nets.
diseases.food_advice: Light, easily digestible foods. Increase fluid intake.

diseases.name: Cholera
diseases.initial_advice: This suggests **severe dehydration**. Start Oral Rehydration Salts (ORS) immediately. You need urgent medical attention.
medication_suggestions: Oral Rehydration Salts (ORS). Antibiotics may be prescribed by a doctor.
diseases.food_advice: Avoid heavy or fatty foods. Focus on ORS and clean water.

common_exercises.name: Stretching
common_exercises.advice: Good for joint mobility, especially in the morning.
